texto: normal is an opinion from a man just like the rest of us, to function just like society is an idea, that to limit and bound reality to make life convenient was fascinating to one soul. then soon to his lot, what is called evil or insane is what people feel is too much or sacrilegious to look for, the unknown. I liked it, I am called a monster, for being what god only knows.― Tashie McKay
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tashie McKay: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “normal is an opinion from a man just like the rest of us, to function just like society is an ide…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, science-fiction, called pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
